# AI Session: Testing Strategy

## Date: 2026-05-03

## Context
Setting up comprehensive test suite with Jest and Supertest.

## AI Interaction Summary
- Asked Claude to create integration tests for all API endpoints
- Claude suggested testing pyramid approach (unit + integration)

- Added edge case testing for validation

## Key Decisions
- Used Supertest for API integration testing
- Created separate test database
- Implemented beforeEach/afterEach for clean state
- Added tests for success and error scenarios
